Compare

DataVision Pro vs Looker Studio

Updated 2026-04-21

DataVision Pro is an AI-first analytics platform built around uploading a file and getting cleaned data, statistics, ML, and AI insights immediately. Looker Studio (formerly Google Data Studio) is a free dashboard tool tightly integrated with the Google ecosystem — Sheets, BigQuery, Google Ads, GA4. Pick DataVision Pro for fast file-based analysis with AI; pick Looker Studio for free shareable dashboards on Google data sources.

Best for DataVision Pro

Analysts who upload CSV/Excel files and want AI-explained cleaning, statistics, and ML in one tool.

Best for Looker Studio

Teams that live in Google Sheets, BigQuery, Google Ads, or GA4 and need free, shareable dashboards.

Side-by-side comparison

FeatureDataVision ProLooker Studio
Primary use case Ad-hoc analysis of files Dashboards over Google data sources
Setup time Sign up → upload → insights in minutes Connect data source → model → build dashboard
Auto data cleaning Built-in toggleable cleaning pipeline Limited — calculated fields and data blending only
AI chat over your data Built-in (GPT-powered) Gemini in Looker Studio Pro [verify against current Google pricing]
Built-in ML K-Means + RandomForest + linear models None natively; requires BigQuery ML or Vertex AI
Best data sources CSV, Excel uploads Google Sheets, BigQuery, Google Ads, GA4 (150+ connectors)
Pricing entry point 60-day free Tier 3 trial; tiered free access Free; Looker Studio Pro adds enterprise features
Dashboard sharing Web link, role-based access Native Google Drive sharing — links, viewers, editors
Refresh schedule Re-upload or re-import on demand Live connections refresh automatically

When to choose DataVision Pro

  • Your data lives in flat files (CSV/Excel), not Google warehouses.
  • You want AI summaries and recommendations baked into every chart.
  • You need cleaning, descriptive statistics, and ML in one tool with no extra licences.
  • You don't need always-live dashboard refresh — periodic uploads are fine.

When to choose Looker Studio

  • Your data already lives in Google Sheets, BigQuery, GA4, or Google Ads.
  • You need free, shareable, always-live dashboards more than AI cleaning or ML.
  • Your stakeholders are used to Google's editing UX (Docs, Sheets, Slides).
  • You're standing up marketing or product reporting on a Google stack.

Frequently asked questions

Is Looker Studio really free?

Yes — the standard product is free for any Google account. Looker Studio Pro adds enterprise features (team workspaces, asset management, support) at a per-project monthly fee. [verify against current Google pricing]

Does DataVision Pro connect to BigQuery?

Today it consumes CSV/Excel uploads. Direct warehouse connectors are on the roadmap. For now, export the relevant slice from BigQuery to CSV and upload it.

Which is better for AI?

DataVision Pro builds AI into every analysis page out of the box. Looker Studio's Gemini features sit behind the Pro tier and focus on chart-suggestion and natural-language querying.

Can I use both?

Yes — many teams use Looker Studio for live shareable dashboards over GA4/Google Ads, and DataVision Pro for deeper ad-hoc analysis on extracts.

Notes marked [verify] are pending confirmation against the latest official pricing or feature pages from Looker Studio. We never publish a number we can't source.

Try DataVision Pro on your own data

60-day Tier 3 trial. No credit card.
